name: Possible Reconnaissance Activity
description: Detects possible reconnaissance activity, such as the execution of multiple discovery commands within a short timeframe.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the last detected discovery command execution.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account that executed the discovery commands.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The hostname where the discovery commands were executed.

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: The domain of the user account.

parameters.name: process_path
parameters.description: The path of the executable that triggered the alert (e.g., whoami.exe, nltest.exe, net1.exe, ipconfig.exe, systeminfo.exe). Since aggregation applies, this would be a list or a representative command.

parameters.name: command
parameters.description: The full command line of the executed discovery command.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: The number of discovery commands executed within the specified interval.

parameters.name: interval
parameters.description: The time interval (in seconds) within which the multiple commands were detected (default 60 seconds).
